title: What Does Commercial Video Production Actually Cost in Northeast Florida?
excerpt: Commercial video production in Northeast Florida ranges from a few hundred dollars to $15,000+. Here's what actually drives the cost and how to make a good decision.
author: diego-cerquera

content.alt: Cinema cameras lined up for video production
content.caption: Professional equipment is one factor that drives production cost

content.alt: On-location video production in St. Augustine
content.caption: Location shoots require planning, crew, and gear coordination

seo.title: Commercial Video Production Cost in Florida
seo.description: What does commercial video production cost in Northeast Florida? A realistic breakdown from social clips ($500-$2,500) to full campaigns ($9,500+).
